Two Pointers.trigger: Pairs summing to target in sorted array (3Sum), Container With Most Water, Palindrome check

Sliding Window.trigger: Longest/Shortest Subarray or Substring matching a condition, At most K distinct elements
Sliding Window.complexity: Time: O(N) | Space: O(1) or O(K)

Binary Search.trigger: Maximize minimum, minimize maximum, searching in a monotonic answer space (Leftmost / Rightmost)
Binary Search.complexity: Time: O(N log(Max - Min)) | Space: O(1)

Greedy.trigger: Interval Scheduling, Minimum jumps, Maximizing/Minimizing without exhaustive search. (Use ONLY when local optimum guarantees global optimum)
Greedy.complexity: Time: O(N log N) usually due to sorting | Space: O(1)

Linked List.trigger: Reverse in place, Find middle node, Cycle detection (Floyd's Tortoise and Hare)

Monotonic Stack.trigger: Find Next Greater/Smaller Element, Largest Rectangle in Histogram, Trapping Rain Water

Priority Queue (Heap).trigger: Top K elements, Kth largest/smallest, Median from data stream, Merge K sorted lists
Priority Queue (Heap).complexity: Time: O(N log K) | Space: O(K)

Sweep Line (Intervals).trigger: Overlapping intervals, Meeting Rooms, Maximum concurrent events, Skyline problem
Sweep Line (Intervals).complexity: Time: O(N log N) | Space: O(N)

Tree: BFS / DFS Traversal.trigger: Level order traversal, Lowest Common Ancestor, Tree depth/diameter, Path sum
Tree: BFS / DFS Traversal.complexity: Time: O(N) | Space: O(H) for DFS, O(N) for BFS

Trie (Prefix Tree).trigger: Prefix matching, Autocomplete, Word Search II, Maximum XOR of Two Numbers
Trie (Prefix Tree).complexity: Time: O(L) per word | Space: O(N * L * 26)

Backtracking.trigger: Permutations, Combinations, Subsets, N-Queens, Exhaustive search with constraints
Backtracking.complexity: Time: O(N!) or O(2^N) | Space: O(N)

Graph: BFS.trigger: Shortest path in unweighted graphs, Minimum steps to reach a state, Word Ladder

Graph: Topological Sort.trigger: Task scheduling, Dependency resolution, Cycle detection in directed graphs, Alien Dictionary
Graph: Topological Sort.complexity: Time: O(V + E) | Space: O(V + E)

Graph: Union-Find (DSU).trigger: Dynamic connectivity, Cycle detection in undirected graphs, Group/Set union and find

Graph: Dijkstra.trigger: Shortest path in graphs with non-negative weights, Network Delay Time, Minimum cost
Graph: Dijkstra.complexity: Time: O((V + E) log V) | Space: O(V + E)

Segment Tree.trigger: Dynamic range queries (Sum/Max/Min) and point/range updates
Segment Tree.complexity: Time: O(log N) per query/update | Space: O(N)

Digit DP.trigger: Count numbers in range [L, R] satisfying specific digit-based rules (e.g., no digit 4)

Bitmask DP.trigger: N < 20, Traveling Salesperson (TSP), State representation using bits, Subset permutations
Bitmask DP.complexity: Time: O(2^N * N^2) | Space: O(2^N * N)
